field.label: Enable NetDefense
field.help: This will activate the NetDefense Agent service.

field.label: Registration Token
field.help: UUID token for NetDefense server registration.

field.label: Device ID
field.help: Unique UUID identifier for this device (auto-generated when page loads if empty). Use the "Reset ID" button to generate a new UUID.

field.label: Server Address
field.help: NetDefense server URL (e.g., https://hub.netdefense.io or https://example.com:8443).

field.label: Pathfinder Address
field.help: Pathfinder server URL for remote shell connections.

field.label: Pathfinder SSL Verification
field.help: Enable SSL certificate verification for Pathfinder connections.

field.label: Re-bind Token
field.help: One-time token from your NetDefense administrator (issued via "ndcli device rebind-token <name>"). Paste here to re-bind this device's signing key — used after a suspected key leak, hardware replacement, or routine rotation. The agent rotates its keypair automatically when this field is set. Clear this field once the device shows ENABLED again.
